_doc: Single source of truth for execution mode. Read by shared/execution/mode.py. Override priority: env EXECUTION_MODE > this file > legacy LIVE_TRADING_ENABLED env. Always defaults to 'paper'.

_modes.paper: scripts/live/paper_portfolio.py — signal-price fills, in-memory equity, no exchange calls
_modes.virtual: shared/execution/virtual_futures.py — full sim with slippage/latency/partial-fills, isolated to data/virtual/
_modes.testnet: Binance Futures testnet — real API, fake money, real microstructure
_modes.live: Binance Futures mainnet — REAL MONEY, requires LIVE_TRADING_ENABLED=true + 2-week testnet soak + per-deploy --confirm-live

ramp._doc: paper→live capital ramp. Applied as a multiplier to position sizes when mode=live. scripts/live/ramp_controller.py manages stage progression. Stays at 0.0 in non-live modes.

promote_gates._min_live_pnl_pct_doc: Cumulative paper PnL since stage_started_at must be >= this percent (0 = break-even). Blocks promotion when alpha is bleeding even if DD/drift gates would otherwise pass.
